case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. CARLOS RAFAEL QUIAL MAGANA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JHONATHAN HERRADA LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT CAROLOS RAFAEL QUIAL MAGANA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAGANA, CARLOS RAFAEL QUIAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGANA, CARLOS RAFAEL QUIAL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.
